{
  "patchText": "*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: E:\1-CrewBeeLab\CrewBee\README.md
@@
 ## Installation
 
-### Shortest path for humans
+Set up CrewBee for OpenCode in one command.
+No project-local `node_modules`. No manual OpenCode config editing.
 
-If you are using an LLM agent, send it this instruction:
+### Recommended
+
+Best for first-time users. This installs OpenCode if it is missing, installs CrewBee into the OpenCode user-level workspace, writes the canonical plugin entry `"crewbee"`, runs doctor checks, and prints next steps.
+
+```bash
+npx crewbee@latest setup --with-opencode
+```
+
+### Already Have OpenCode
+
+Use this if `opencode` is already available in your terminal.
+
+```bash
+npx crewbee@latest setup
+```
+
+### For LLM Agents
 
 ```text
-Install CrewBee by following docs/guide/installation.md in the current repository.
-Use only the OpenCode user-level installation flow. Do not use the old project-local installation flow.
+Install CrewBee for OpenCode.
+
+Run:
+npx crewbee@latest setup --with-opencode --yes
+
+Then verify:
+npx crewbee@latest doctor
+
+Important:
+- Do not install CrewBee into this project's nod

{
  "patchText": "*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: E:\1-CrewBeeLab\CrewBee\README.zh-CN.md
@@
 ## 安装
 
-### 给人类的最短路径
+一条命令为 OpenCode 配置 CrewBee。
+不安装到业务项目 `node_modules`，不需要手动改 OpenCode 配置。
 
-如果你在用 LLM Agent，直接把下面这段发给它：
+### 推荐安装
+
+适合第一次使用的用户。它会在需要时安装 OpenCode，把 CrewBee 安装到 OpenCode 用户级 workspace，写入标准插件入口 `"crewbee"`，运行 doctor 检查，并提示下一步。
+
+```bash
+npx crewbee@latest setup --with-opencode
+```
+
+### 已经安装 OpenCode
+
+如果终端里已经可以使用 `opencode`，执行：
+
+```bash
+npx crewbee@latest setup
+```
+
+### 给 LLM Agent
 
 ```text
-请按照当前仓库中的 docs/guide/installation.zh-CN.md 完成 CrewBee 安装。
-只使用 OpenCode 用户级安装流程，不要使用旧的 project-local 安装方式。
-```
+为 OpenCode 安装 CrewBee。
 
-或者你自己阅读：
+执行：
+npx crewbee@latest setup --with-opencode --yes
 
-* [安装指南](docs/guide/installation.zh-CN.md)
+然后验证：
+npx crewbee@latest doctor
 
-### 给 LLM Agent 的最短路径
+注意：
+- 不要把 CrewBee 安装进当前业务项目的 node_modules。
+- 不要手动修改业务项目文件。
+- CrewBee 应安装到 OpenCode 用户级 workspace。
+- OpenCode plugin entry 应为 "crewbee"。
+- 安装完成后，告诉用户进入项目运行 `opencode` 并选择 `coding-leader`。
+```
 
-直接读取并执行中文指南：
+完整说明：[安装指南](docs/guide/installation.zh-CN.md)
+
+---
+
+## 快速开始
+
+1. 安装并验证 CrewBee。
+
+
[truncated]

{
  "patchText": "*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: E:\1-CrewBeeLab\CrewBee\docs\guide\installation.md
+# Installation
+
+Language: English | [中文](./installation.zh-CN.md)
+
+CrewBee installs as an OpenCode user-level plugin. The recommended path is one command, then start OpenCode in your project and select `coding-leader`.
+
+## Quick Start
+
+```bash
+npx crewbee@latest setup --with-opencode
+```
+
+Then open a project:
+
+```bash
+cd /path/to/your/project
+opencode
+```
+
+Select:
+
+```text
+coding-leader
+```
+
+Run a real task:
+
+```text
+Use CrewBee Coding Team to fix this issue with review-backed completion.
+```
+
+## Install Options
+
+### Recommended
+
+Best for first-time users. It checks OpenCode, installs OpenCode if missing, installs CrewBee, writes the canonical OpenCode plugin entry, runs doctor, and prints next steps.
+
+```bash
+npx crewbee@latest setup --with-opencode
+```
+
+### Already Have OpenCode
+
+Use this if `opencode` already works in your terminal.
+
+```bash
+npx crewbee@latest setup
+```
+
+### Non-Interactive / LLM Agents
+
+```bash
+npx crewbee@latest setup --with-opencode --yes
+```
+
+Ag
[truncated]
